summary: Large mp/mplib decompilation and cleanup PR that matched or mostly matched much of the map/collision library, replacing many address-only mpLib/mpColl symbols with named APIs, typed prototypes, and collision structs. The work touched mplib.c heavily and propagated renames/types through mpcoll, mpisland, fighter, ground, and item callers. The author noted there was still follow-up work for caller renames, then delayed merge to add more matches before declaring the PR complete.
what_changed: Reworked src/melee/mp/mplib.c at large scale, with 5918 added and 916 deleted lines in the PR slice, indicating major replacement of prior partial/placeholder decompilation.

Updated config/GALE01/symbols.txt to rename many address-based mpLib and mpColl symbols to descriptive names, including mpLibLoad, mpGetGroundCollVtx, mpGetGroundCollLine, mpGetGroundCollJoint, mpLineGetNext, mpLineGetPrev, mpLineGetV1Pos, mpLineGetV0Pos, mpLineGetKind, mpLineGetFlags, mpLineGetNormal, mpUpdateDynamics, mpVtxGetPos, mpVtxSetPos, mpLineSetPos, mpGetSpeed, mpJointFromLine, mpJointSetCb1, mpJointClearCb1, mpJointGetCb1, mpJointSetCb2, mpJointGetCb2, mpLib_SetupDraw, mpLib_DrawEcbs, mpLib_DrawSnapping, mpLib_DrawMatchingLines, mpLib_DrawCrosses, mpLib_DrawSpecialPoints, and mpLib_DrawZones.

Kept some partially understood routines address-based but added semantic suffixes such as _Floor, _Ceiling, _LeftWall, and _RightWall, for example mpLib_8004DD90_Floor, mpLib_8004E090_Ceiling, mpLib_8004E398_LeftWall, and mpLib_8004E684_RightWall.

Expanded mplib.h from many UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS declarations into typed prototypes using CollVtx, CollLine, CollJoint, mpCollData, Vec3, GXColor, Ground, Fighter_GObj, callbacks, explicit line_id/joint_id/vtx_id names, and output-pointer names.

Replaced unknown mp structs in mp/types.h with more meaningful collision/map types including mpLib_Line, CollLine, CollVtx, CollInfo, CollJoint, mpCollData, mpIsland_PaletteEntry, and mpIsland_Palette, with STATIC_ASSERTs preserving known sizes for CollVtx and CollJoint.

Changed mplib.static.h static globals from generic mpLib_804D64B8_t/mp_UnkStruct2/mpLib_804D64C0_t pointers to groundCollVtx, groundCollLine, groundCollJoint, mpCollData, and CollJoint pointers; also documented static bounds/vector arrays.
Updated callers across fighter, item, and ground code to use renamed/typed mpLib APIs, with notable churn in ft_081B.c, ftCo_0A01.c, itlinkhookshot.c, mpisland.c, and mpcoll.c.
Renamed related data symbols such as mpIsland_TerrainPalette, mpLib_ItemSpawnVtxIds, mpLib_SpawnVtxIds, and mpLib_RespawnVtxIds.
smart_moves: Used direction/surface suffixes (_Floor, _Ceiling, _LeftWall, _RightWall) as an intermediate naming strategy where full behavior was not proven, preserving address identity while still making collision orientation obvious.
Propagated type discoveries into headers instead of only matching local C, allowing downstream fighter/item/ground callsites to become better typed and easier to search.
Separated low-level map concepts into CollVtx, CollLine, CollJoint, CollInfo, and mpCollData, which makes future matching less dependent on anonymous offset fields.
Named accessors around domain nouns and verbs such as mpLineGetFlags, mpVtxSetPos, mpJointSetCb1, and mpGetSpeed, making callsites communicate intent without requiring address lookup.
Kept STATIC_ASSERTs for newly named structs with known binary sizes, reducing the risk of type cleanups silently breaking layout-sensitive matching.
Updated symbols.txt alongside source/header changes, keeping the symbol map synchronized with new names.
decomp_lessons: For large library decompilation, semantic partial names are valuable: keep the address in the symbol when exact function purpose is incomplete, but append proven behavior such as Floor/Ceiling/LeftWall/RightWall.

When replacing UNK prototypes, name parameters by role at the same time, especially line_id, joint_id, vtx_id, flags_out, normal_out, and position/vector outputs; these names make later caller cleanup much easier.
Collision libraries benefit from identifying table/array roles first: vertices, lines, joints, coll-info blocks, flags, and callback slots appear repeatedly across mplib callers.
Update every public-facing declaration and symbol-map entry together; otherwise renamed matched functions leave churn for later PRs.
Binary-layout assertions should accompany struct renames when decomp work upgrades anonymous/padded structs into semantic types.

A matching PR can still leave useful staged work: the author explicitly expected more caller renames after matching/renaming mplib functions, so future PRs should search for stale address-style names in users of mplib.
naming_conventions: Use mpLineGet* for line accessors: mpLineGetNext, mpLineGetPrev, mpLineGetV1Pos, mpLineGetV0Pos, mpLineGetKind, mpLineGetFlags, mpLineGetNormal.
Use mpVtxGet*/mpVtxSet* for collision vertex accessors: mpVtxGetPos and mpVtxSetPos.
Use mpJoint* for collision joint APIs and callbacks: mpJointFromLine, mpJointSetCb1, mpJointClearCb1, mpJointGetCb1, mpJointSetCb2, mpJointGetCb2.
Use mpLib_Draw* and mpLib_SetupDraw for debug/rendering helpers: mpLib_DrawEcbs, mpLib_DrawSnapping, mpLib_DrawMatchingLines, mpLib_DrawCrosses, mpLib_DrawSpecialPoints, mpLib_DrawZones.
For not-fully-understood routines, retain mpLib_ADDRESS plus a semantic suffix, e.g. mpLib_8004F008_Floor, mpLib_8004F8A4_Ceiling, mpLib_800501CC_LeftWall, mpLib_800509B8_RightWall.
Prefer explicit id parameter names such as line_id, joint_id, vtx_id, ledge_id, and output names such as flags_out, normal_out, line_id_out, vec_out, pos_out.
Data symbols use descriptive domain names when identified: mpIsland_TerrainPalette, mpLib_ItemSpawnVtxIds, mpLib_SpawnVtxIds, mpLib_RespawnVtxIds.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Converted many UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS declarations to exact or more constrained signatures, which is a common matching tactic for stabilizing call ABI and caller codegen.
Used semantically split variants for floor/ceiling/wall collision routines, reflecting likely repeated control-flow templates with different axis/direction tests.
Typed out-parameters as u32* flags_out, Vec3* normal_out, int* line_id_out, and float* x/y outputs to match how collision queries return multiple results.
Introduced CollVtx and CollJoint size assertions to preserve struct layout while changing field names and types.
Replaced local/global unknown pointers with typed static globals such as groundCollVtx, groundCollLine, and groundCollJoint, reducing casts and making generated code more predictable.
Synchronized symbol renames with source renames so map/config output reflects matched function identities.
review_feedback: No formal review comments were present in the slice.
The PR body/self-comment notes evidence of unfinished cleanup: 'probably still lots work to do, especially things like renames in callers of matched/renamed `mplib` functions'.
The author asked maintainers not to merge while adding more matches, then later commented 'alright that's all i got', indicating the PR accumulated additional matching work before merge.
follow_up_queries: Find remaining callers using address-style mpLib_800* names after PR #1968, especially in fighter, item, and ground files.
Audit mpLib_ADDRESS_SurfaceSuffix names to determine whether stronger non-address names can now be assigned.
Search for remaining mp_UnkStruct types in src/melee/mp and callers that could now be CollVtx, CollLine, CollJoint, CollInfo, or mpCollData.
Review mpcoll.c after the mplib type upgrade for additional match opportunities and rename consistency with mpCollPrev, mpCollEnd, mpColl_SetLedgeSnap, and mpColl_IsOnPlatform.
Check whether mpIsland palette/data names can be propagated into documentation and remaining mpIsland callers.
